title: AL's Dragon Egg Revamped
description: A pack that revamps the Dragon Egg and gives it an item sprite!
body:
![Dragon Egg Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1eba81389abee1f0435de6dc725d9c93fbaf2d3.png)

# 

This pack revamps the Dragon Egg and gives it a 2D item sprite in the inventory, NO MODS REQUIRED!

This is a splinter pack of my other pack, AL's Boss Rush, which only includes the Dragon Egg.

Video of the main pack which showcases this feature:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Yi-bHjJ9aB4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:

*Revamped Dragon Egg

*2D item sprite for Dragon Egg
